# Yoly Estetica Salon & Spa

> Professional beauty salon and spa located in Luquillo, Puerto Rico.
> Owner and lead stylist: Yoly (10+ years of experience).
> Contact via WhatsApp: +1 (787) 214-0867

## About

Yoly Estetica Salon & Spa is a full-service beauty salon in Luquillo, Puerto Rico,
serving women who want professional, personalized beauty care in a warm and welcoming
environment. The salon is known for high-quality results, certified techniques, and
genuine attention to every client.

## Location & Contact

- Address: PR-3 KM 37.2, Luquillo, PR 00773, United States
- Phone / WhatsApp: (787) 214-0867
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yoly.peru
- WhatsApp: +1 (787) 214-0867 (preferred for booking)

## Hours

- Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM (AST)
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (AST)
- Sunday: Closed

## Services Offered

### Hair (Cabello)
Haircut, hair color, full color, highlights, balayage, keratin treatment, hair
straightening, blowout, and event/bridal updos.

### Nails (Uñas)
Classic manicure, classic pedicure, gel nails, acrylic nails, nail art, and
custom nail designs.

### Skin & Face (Piel y Rostro)
Facial cleansing, facial waxing, eyebrow shaping, lash extensions, social
makeup, and bridal makeup.

### Spa & Body (Spa y Cuerpo)
Body waxing (legs, underarms), relaxing massage, body scrub/exfoliation,
and tanning.

## Why choose Yoly Estetica?

- Located in Luquillo, Puerto Rico — easily accessible on the northeast coast
- 10+ years of professional experience
- Certified techniques and premium products
- Warm, personalized service — every client treated as a priority
- Online booking available — no phone call required
- Bridal and event packages available
